columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: Identifies the unique game for which the odds are provided, linking it to specific events in the NFL schedule.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Represents the NFL season during which the game takes place, allowing for historical comparisons and trend analysis.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Indicates the week of the NFL season, which helps in analyzing performance across different phases of the season.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: Specifies the type of game, such as regular season, playoffs, or preseason, providing context on the stakes of the odds.

columns.name: market
columns.comment: Refers to the betting market, which indicates the type of bet available, such as point spread or moneyline, influencing betting strategies.

columns.name: side
columns.comment: Denotes the team or option that the odds are favoring in a betting scenario, essential for understanding market sentiment.

columns.name: line
columns.comment: Displays the point spread or betting line set for the game, which is crucial for calculating potential outcomes.

columns.name: price
columns.comment: Reflects the odds or payout associated with a bet, offering insight into how likely bookmakers think an event is to occur.

columns.name: source
columns.comment: Indicates the source of the odds data, which is important for verifying the reliability and accuracy of the information.

columns.name: bookmaker
columns.comment: Identifies the bookmaker offering the odds, which can affect competitiveness and potential profitability for bettors.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: Records the timestamp when the odds data was added to the database, useful for tracking updates and changes over time.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: Contains the name of the source file from which the odds data was ingested, useful for auditing and data lineage purposes.
